Home Design Seminars

Presenting the Academic Workshop Zola Theme

For workshops, seminars, and academic events

Website GitHub

Design

Welcome to the Academic Workshop theme. This Eleventy port preserves the original HTML and CSS visual system.

Features

  • A customizable header with title, subtitle, banner, and CTA buttons.
  • Structured sections for speakers, organizers, schedule, papers, and seminars.
  • List cards for seminar pages with image, author, institution, date, and links.
  • Responsive CSS-only layout with no framework runtime dependency.

This website is built using Eleventy and the Academic Workshop theme, which is designed to last.
